name: WHOIS Domain API
description: Domain WHOIS/RDAP lookup, DNS records query, and domain availability check using RDAP protocol and Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS.
long_description: A fast and reliable WHOIS Domain API built on Cloudflare Workers. Perform domain WHOIS lookups using the modern RDAP protocol (Registration Data Access Protocol), query DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME) via Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS, check domain availability, and list all RDAP-supported TLDs. Returns registrar info, registration/expiration dates, nameservers, DNSSEC status, and more. Built-in caching for optimal performance.

endpoints.name: WHOIS Lookup
endpoints.description: Full RDAP/WHOIS domain lookup with registrar, dates, nameservers, and DNSSEC

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to look up (e.g., example.com)

endpoints.name: DNS Records
endpoints.description: Query DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME)

endpoints.name: Domain Availability
endpoints.description: Check if a domain is available for registration

endpoints.name: TLD List
endpoints.description: List all TLDs supported by RDAP

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
